title: Offline Photo Uploading
excerpt: We would like to be able to upload photos offline in board updates. .

posts.author: vwarren (Valerie Warren)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to be able to upload photos offline in board updates. .

posts.author: garan.k_phytech (Garan Keeler)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see a platform listed, but I would appreciate this feature on the mobile app for ios / android. It’s also a bummer that you can’t post and update until the photos / files have completely uploaded to the server. It would be nice if you could post the update, have it sync in the background when you get reconnected, and upload any missing files / photos with it.
